subcodes.first_line: Thou knowest, O my God, that my lips have not been opened save by Thy leave, and that the Ancient Pen hath not moved except by Thy command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انت تعلم یا الهی بان شفتائی مافتحتا الا باذنک و ماجری قلم القدم الا بامرک و
